title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY LANE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY EGAN WARMING CENTERS SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on Egan Warming Centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. Email Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY VENETA WARMING CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures are extremely cold. 25133 E Broadway Veneta, OR 97487 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Open when temperatures are 28 degrees or below Email (541) 556-3336 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY COMMUNITY SHARING WARMING SHELTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter during times of extreme weather when average overnight temperatures reach 29 degrees or below. Hot drinks and snacks provided. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. No pets allowed. Hours: Open 7pm-8am during cold weather activation. Doors open 7pm-10pm. If there are no guests by 10pm, the site will shut down for the evening Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
